Workflows are, sorry, I know I've been saying it, but they're basically how you define the logic behind your app and what's happening when users interact with different components, like the buttons on this page.
It's similar to functions and code, but workflows and Bubble are just sets of actions that can run when a certain trigger occurs.
So for example, if I click on this login as finance admin button, that'll actually trigger a workflow in my app.
So I'm going to put it on step-by-step mode here, which means you'll just see the steps of the workflow.

This is the most fundamentally important thing when building a bubble because they allow you to actually add functionality to your app.
